name: RTÉ
notes: National public service broadcaster; high authority across every vertical.

name: The Irish Times
notes: Paper of record; strong sections for business, tech, legal.

name: Irish Independent
notes: Largest national newspaper circulation; reach-heavy for consumer brands.

name: TheJournal.ie
notes: Digital-native news; high engagement, younger audience.

name: Irish Examiner
notes: Cork-based national daily; strong in Munster + agri/food.

name: BreakingNews.ie
notes: Examiner-owned rapid-news outlet; good for syndication.

name: The Business Post
notes: Sunday business/finance paper of record in Ireland.

name: Business Plus
notes: Mid-market business trade press; tech company profile features.

name: Silicon Republic
notes: Irish tech trade press; heavy emphasis on startups + scaleups.

name: TechCentral.ie
notes: Enterprise-IT focus; CIO/CTO readership.

name: ThinkBusiness
notes: SME-focused; covers scaling stories, fintech, regional business.

name: Checkout
notes: Grocery + retail trade press; brand launches, shopper trends.

name: ShelfLife
notes: Convenience + forecourt retail trade press.

name: Hospitality Ireland
notes: Hotels / restaurants / bars trade press.

name: Hotelier
notes: Hotel-industry trade title.

name: Licensing World
notes: Irish drinks trade press.

name: Fáilte Ireland
notes: State tourism authority — listings, programs, operator supports.

name: Tourism Ireland
notes: Global marketer of Ireland abroad; inbound tourism.

name: Ireland Before You Die
notes: High-traffic travel blog; strong for tourism-aligned brands.

name: Independent.ie Travel
notes: Large-audience travel vertical.

name: Construction Ireland
notes: Construction trade press.

name: Construction Network Ireland
notes: Trade directory + news hybrid.

name: Construction Industry Federation
notes: Industry body — guidance, member listings, policy.

name: Engineers Journal
notes: Engineers Ireland member publication.

name: Engineers Ireland
notes: Professional body — registers, CPD, thought leadership.

name: Law Society of Ireland
notes: Solicitor regulator; directory of member firms.

name: The Bar of Ireland
notes: Barrister regulator + directory.

name: Law Society Gazette
notes: Legal-profession trade journal.

name: Lexology
notes: International legal-content platform; Irish firms publish here.

name: Mondaq
notes: Legal articles + thought-leadership hub.

name: Marketing.ie
notes: Irish marketing industry trade press.

name: AdWorld.ie
notes: Ad industry news + awards; agency business stories.

name: Institute of Advertising Practitioners in Ireland
notes: Industry body for Irish ad agencies.

name: Digital Marketing Institute
notes: Dublin-based training + content.

name: Enterprise Ireland
notes: State agency supporting Irish-owned exporters.

name: IDA Ireland
notes: Foreign-direct-investment agency; high-authority for multinational narrative.

name: Bord Bia
notes: Irish food board — market research, export supports.

name: Bord Gáis Energy
notes: Utility; large consumer audience via content/sponsorships.

name: Dublin Chamber
notes: Dublin-region chamber of commerce.

name: Chambers Ireland
notes: National chamber network.

name: Sunday Business Post (archive)
notes: Legacy archive, still frequently cited.

name: Fora
notes: Irish business / entrepreneurship vertical (Journal Media).

name: Tech Ireland
notes: Open-data directory of Irish tech companies.

name: Startup Ireland
notes: National startup ecosystem body.

name: Trinity News
notes: Trinity College Dublin student paper; reach for youth brands.

name: The University Times
notes: TCD student journalism.

name: Lovin Dublin
notes: Dublin lifestyle + food discovery; strong social reach.

name: IMAGE
notes: Lifestyle magazine; higher-income consumer brands.

name: EVOKE
notes: DMG-owned consumer lifestyle.

name: Irish Central
notes: Irish-American diaspora audience; good for tourism brands.

name: Agriland
notes: Agriculture trade press.

name: Irish Farmers Journal
notes: Weekly farming newspaper; authoritative agri voice.

name: Bord Bia (alt domain)
notes: Alt-spelling fallback for Bord Bia.

name: The Wild Larder
notes: Small-scale food discovery community.

name: r/Ireland
notes: Largest Irish Reddit community; AI citations common.

name: r/Dublin
notes: Dublin-focused community; recommendations threads frequently cited.

name: Boards.ie
notes: Long-running Irish discussion forum; high SERP presence.

name: Askaboutmoney
notes: Personal-finance community; authoritative for money questions.

name: Yelp Ireland
notes: Reviews directory; diminishing but still cited.

name: Tripadvisor Ireland
notes: Tourist-heavy reviews; strong for hotels + attractions.

name: Golden Pages
notes: Irish business directory; legacy but still queried.

name: Yell Ireland
notes: Business directory.

name: Wikipedia
notes: Baseline reference across all sectors.
